title: Finding Your Unfair Advantage With Ash Ali & Hasan Kubba
summary: Ash Ali and Hasan Kubba, co-authors of The Unfair Advantage, on the idea that every founder has a built-in advantage most of them never leverage — and how to find and use yours.
full_content_text: Ash Ali and Hasan Kubba, co-authors of The Unfair Advantage, on the idea that every founder has a built-in advantage most of them never leverage — and how to find and use yours.
